TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kus_kus, title = Kus_kus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kus_kus} }

S.FORM: alang Kus kus ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 631 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 606 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kus kus hya' ga Sinevaudjan. tay mkyahu' na Kus kus hya' ga Draki. tay 'zil na Kus kus hya' ga Anteng. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kus kus ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 631 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 606 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kus kus hya' ga Sinevaudjan. tay mkyahu' na Kus kus hya' ga Draki. tay 'zil na Kus kus hya' ga Anteng. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kus~…ē kus~…ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu ő≤otan …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na kus~…ē kus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēine*au*jan. taj mkjańßu Ē na kus~…ē kus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a *raki. taj Ēzil na kus~…ē kus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a anteŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
